name: Dr. Sarah Chen
bio: Dr. Sarah Chen is a Principal Cloud Architect at Microsoft with over 15 years of experience in AI and cloud computing. She specializes in designing scalable AI solutions and has published numerous papers on machine learning architectures.
title: Principal Cloud Architect

name: Marcus Rodriguez
bio: Marcus is a Senior Solutions Engineer helping enterprises build production-ready AI applications. He's passionate about developer experience and has contributed to several open-source AI projects.
title: Senior Solutions Engineer

name: Emily Watson
bio: Emily is a Cloud Developer Advocate specializing in serverless architectures. She creates educational content and speaks at conferences worldwide about event-driven design patterns.
title: Cloud Developer Advocate

name: Raj Patel
bio: Raj is a Principal DevOps Engineer with deep expertise in Kubernetes and container orchestration. He's a CNCF Ambassador and contributes to the Kubernetes project.
title: Principal DevOps Engineer

name: Lisa Andersson
bio: Lisa is a Staff Platform Engineer building large-scale container platforms. She's passionate about developer productivity and has implemented Kubernetes solutions for Fortune 500 companies.
title: Staff Platform Engineer

name: James Wilson
bio: James is a Security Architect focused on cloud security and Zero Trust implementations. He advises organizations on securing their cloud infrastructure and applications.
title: Security Architect

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Olivia is a Full Stack Engineer and Next.js enthusiast. She builds modern web applications and teaches web development through workshops and online courses.
title: Full Stack Engineer

name: David Kim
bio: David is a Principal Data Engineer with expertise in building modern data platforms. He's designed data architectures for enterprises processing petabytes of data daily.
title: Principal Data Engineer
